Video.summary: Two palms lean into rolling waves.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: High Tide

Video.summary: Bob harmonizes two oval landscapes.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Oval Fantasy

Video.summary: Mist seeps through a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Deep Woods

Video.summary: Firs frame a lake and peak.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Mirage

Video.summary: Bob uses blue tones to paint a wintry scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Winter

Video.summary: Trees shade a secluded lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Deep Forest Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints within an outline of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Florida's Glory

Video.summary: Bob takes a landscape from summer to winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Two Seasons

Video.summary: Pines and peaks guard a still lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Peaks of Majesty

Video.summary: The stillness of a cold darkness is captured as a cozy little cabin rests atop a snow covered hill.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Night

Video.summary: Forest growth surrounds a tiny cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Nestled Cabin

Video.summary: Bare trees and firs back a tiny shack.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wintertime Discovery

Video.summary: John Thamm paints a head and face.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Contemplative Lady

Video.summary: Far, far away there rests a mountain nestled in misty clouds and foothills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Distant Hills

Video.summary: Bob paints a desert site within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Glow

Video.summary: Bob paints a rocky mountain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lone Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints an autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Images

Video.summary: Bob paints a scenic river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Around the Bend

Video.summary: Bob paints flowering trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Trace of Spring

Video.summary: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a deep-woods scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tranquil Wooded Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a hazy woods on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Purple Haze

Video.summary: Bob paints purple skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Aglow

Video.summary: The sounds of quiet waters, the sight of velvety green shrubs and the hint of distance foothills in a perfect scene of relaxation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Inlet

Video.summary: Bob paints a mirror image.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snow Birch

Video.summary: Bob paints within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Storm's A Comin'

Video.summary: Bob paints a landscape in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Countryside Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene of early winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Russet Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a beautiful summer getaway with rugged brown peaks, clear blue waters and a cozy little cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Retreat

Video.summary: Beautiful foliage and fierce skies with an almighty mountain overlooking a calm lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Final Grace

Video.summary: Bob paints an early spring scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hint of Springtime

Video.summary: Bob paints a fishing spot.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Angler's Haven

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

Video.summary: Sunshine on a waterside landscape.

Video.title: Twilight Beauty

Video.summary: Bob paints a river scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Purple Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Early Autumn

Video.summary: Bob paints a bridge in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Covered Bridge

Video.summary: Breathtaking skies, bending palms and waves that accentuate the cool night breeze.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Moon

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rustic Winter Woods

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry night.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening at the Falls

Video.summary: A bubbling stream, a distant waterfall and tumultuous skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black Waterfall

Video.summary: A wondrous plush green forest where an almost invisible mountain overlooks a falling stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Waterfall
